en: This is my good friend I told you about This is Forrest Gump Forrest this is Wesley

en: Wesley and I live together in Berkeley and he's the president of the Berkeley chapter of SDS Let me tell you something else We are here to offer protection and help for all those who need our help because we the Black Panthers are against
ko: 그는 SDS의 버클리 지부 회장이야. 왜냐하면 우리는 블랙 팬더들이니까.

vi: Wesley va toi song o Berkeley va anh ay la chu tich SDS Berkeley De toi noi them Chung toi o day de bao ve va giup do vi chung toi Black Panthers chong lai

en: the war in Vietnam Yes we are against any war where black soldiers are sent to the front line to die for a country that hates them Yes we are against any war where black soldiers go to fight and come to be brutalized and
ko: 밤에 침대에서 자고 있을 때 죽임을 당하는 전쟁에 반대해. 밤에 침대에서 자고 있을 때 죽임을 당하는 전쟁에 반대해.
